label: Account
description: A chart of accounts entry (general ledger account). Used for financial reporting.

label: Assembly Build
description: Records the assembly of component items into a finished assembly item.

label: Assembly Item
description: An item built from components defined in a Bill of Materials.

label: Assembly Unbuild
description: Reverses an assembly build, returning components back to inventory.

label: Bill of Materials
description: Defines the components and quantities needed to build an assembly item.

label: BOM Revision
description: A versioned revision of a Bill of Materials.

label: Cash Refund
description: A cash refund issued to a customer.

label: Cash Sale
description: An immediate sale that collects payment at time of transaction (no open invoice).

label: Contact
description: A contact person, typically associated with a customer, vendor, or partner.

label: Credit Memo
description: A credit issued to a customer, reducing their balance.

label: Currency
description: A currency definition used across subsidiaries and transactions.

label: Customer
description: A customer entity record. Central to all sales transactions.

label: Customer Deposit
description: Records a deposit payment received from a customer before the order is fulfilled.

label: Customer Payment
description: A payment received from a customer, applied against open invoices.

label: Customer Refund
description: A refund issued to a customer, drawing from existing credit memos.

label: Department
description: An organizational unit used for financial classification and reporting.

label: Deposit
description: Records a bank deposit of customer payments.

label: Deposit Application
description: Applies a customer deposit to an open invoice.

label: Employee
description: An employee record. Used for payroll, time tracking, and HR.

label: Estimate / Quote
description: A sales estimate or quote sent to a customer before an order is placed.

label: Expense Report
description: An employee expense report submitted for reimbursement.

label: Inbound Shipment
description: Tracks the receipt of goods from a vendor before the item receipt is created.

label: Inventory Adjustment
description: Manually adjusts inventory quantities or values.

label: Inventory Item
description: A physical product tracked in inventory.

label: Inventory Transfer
description: Transfers inventory between locations.

label: Invoice
description: A customer invoice representing an accounts receivable amount owed.

label: Item Fulfillment
description: Records the physical shipment of items from a sales order.

label: Item Receipt
description: Records the physical receipt of items from a purchase order.

label: Journal Entry
description: A general ledger journal entry for manual accounting adjustments.

label: Kit / Package Item
description: A group of items sold together as a kit. Components are not tracked individually.

label: Lead
description: A sales lead — a potential customer in the early stages of the sales pipeline.

label: Location
description: A physical location (warehouse, store, office) used for inventory and reporting.

label: Lot Numbered Inventory Item
description: An inventory item tracked by lot number for traceability.

label: Opportunity
description: A sales opportunity with a probability of closing. Part of the CRM pipeline.

label: Partner
description: A business partner (reseller, distributor, etc.) in NetSuite's partner management.

label: Payment Method
description: Defines how payments are made (credit card, check, ACH, wire, etc.).

label: Price Level
description: A pricing tier applied to customers (e.g., Retail, Wholesale, Employee).

label: Project / Job
description: A project record for tracking work, timelines, budgets, and resources.

label: Purchase Order
description: An order sent to a vendor to purchase goods or services.

label: Purchase Requisition
description: An internal request to purchase items or services before a PO is created.

label: Resource Allocation
description: Allocates an employee resource to a project task for capacity planning.

label: Return Authorization (RMA)
description: Authorizes a customer to return previously purchased items.

label: Revenue Arrangement
description: Groups revenue elements for ASC 606 / IFRS 15 revenue recognition.

label: Sales Order
description: A customer order for goods or services. The core transaction in NetSuite's order management.

label: Sales Tax Item
description: Defines a sales tax rate applied to transactions.

label: Serialized Inventory Item
description: An inventory item tracked by unique serial number.

label: Service Item
description: A non-physical service item sold on transactions.

label: Solution
description: A knowledge base article in NetSuite's support module.

label: Subsidiary
description: A subsidiary legal entity in a multi-subsidiary OneWorld environment.

label: Support Case
description: A customer support ticket/case in NetSuite's support center.

label: Task
description: A to-do task assigned to a NetSuite user.

label: Payment Term
description: Defines payment due dates and early-pay discount terms (e.g., Net 30, 2/10 Net 30).

label: Time Entry
description: A single time entry logged by an employee against a project, customer, or case.

label: Timesheet
description: A weekly timesheet aggregating time entries for an employee.

label: Transfer Order
description: Moves inventory between locations, generating item fulfillments and receipts.

label: Vendor
description: A vendor/supplier from whom goods or services are purchased.

label: Vendor Bill
description: A bill received from a vendor representing an accounts payable amount owed.

label: Vendor Credit
description: A credit received from a vendor, reducing the amount owed to them.

label: Vendor Payment
description: A payment sent to a vendor to settle an open bill.

label: Vendor Return Authorization
description: Authorizes a return of items to a vendor.

label: Work Order
description: A manufacturing work order directing the production of assembly items.
